Don't we all love some doomed yuri!!

I really adore the idea that White Lilly might be a somewhat closeted lesbian, even if in the cookie world— It's supported unconditionally. She was literally asked to be queen of the Faerie Kingdom! I also lowkey headcanon that she generally can't feel romantic feelings like.. When she was seperated and divided into two bodies, Dark Enchantress took most of the positive traits so she was more functional rather than the very cookie she actually came from.

(I'm making it sound like Dark Enchantress is her child LMAO)

context: You confess your feelings o lala!! Bad news is she rejects you.
